# GoldFin Desk

GoldFin Desk turns a business's financial activity into organized spreadsheet templates and a plain-English monthly briefing - a recurring finance rhythm for owner-led businesses, without hiring a CFO or bookkeeper.

## Key Pages
- Home: / - what GoldFin Desk is and who it serves
- Pricing: /pricing - Free templates, $150/mo automated Reports, custom-scoped Advisory
- Sample Briefing: /sample-briefing - an example plain-English monthly finance briefing
- Free Templates: /templates - seven free financial templates
- Compare: /compare - GoldFin vs bookkeeper, fractional CFO, and dashboards
- Security & FAQ: /security-faq - data handling, Plaid, and common questions
- Blog: /blog/ - proof-led financial clarity guides for owner-led businesses
- Monthly Financial Reporting Hub: /blog/monthly-financial-reporting/ - owner-ready monthly reporting guides

## Services
- GoldFin Template Vault (Free): seven financial templates owners can use immediately
- GoldFin Reports ($150/mo): your templates auto-filled from your numbers plus a plain-English briefing every month, fully automated
- GoldFin Advisory: custom-priced consultation with Chris Sam for businesses that need real insight, interpretation, and decision support (by application)

## Blog Launch Pages
- /blog/what-small-business-monthly-financial-report-should-include/ - what an owner-ready monthly financial report should include
- /blog/monthly-financial-review-checklist/ - a 30-minute owner monthly financial review routine
- /blog/sample-monthly-finance-briefing/ - how raw numbers become a plain-English monthly briefing
- /blog/how-monthly-financial-reporting-service-works/ - how a monthly financial reporting service works
- /blog/bank-balance-vs-financial-report/ - why bank balance and financial reports tell different stories

## Key Facts
- Category: monthly financial clarity and reporting for small, owner-led businesses
- Not a replacement for tax, legal, accounting, or bookkeeping - it is the clarity layer on top
- Bank connection is optional and read-only via Plaid; no money is ever moved
- Start free; the $150/mo plan is month-to-month and cancellable anytime
